title: Cyber Security (English) Master's Program Application and Fees
content:

TUITION FEES:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-ucretleri

Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

Dear Students,

If you have completed the courses and have reached the Thesis (program with thesis) / Master’s Term Project (program without thesis) stage, you must first enroll into respective course (CYS595 or CYS594) through OBS. We would like to make it possible for you to work with the professor you want in the field of interest to you as much as possible. Therefore, after arranging an appointment, please go to the professors from whom you have taken courses, meet and try to come to an agrrement. Remember that for an efficient thesis work, the professor should also want to work with you, and each professor has a certain quota for students to advise. You can communicate face to face or by e-mail. Do not forget to take your current transcript with you before the interview or attach it to your message.

Best wishes.

Click for Online Application System

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

Who can Apply for Cyber Security Master’s Program?

The graduates of undergraduate programs can apply to the program. Scientific Preparation Program is applied when deemed necessary.

REQUIREMENTS

ALES and YDS result document (ALES and YDS Exam of any field type should be 55 points and above)

Applicants will be subject to science examination or interview.

Applicants will be selected according to the ranking.

Applicants who do not have ALES certificate can apply to master program as special student status.

ALES certificate is not required for the applicants applying to the Master's Program without Thesis.
